---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature for atemporal
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

A clear and concise description of the problem. Example: "I'm
always frustrated when […]"

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use case

Concrete code or scenario where this would be useful:

```ts
// Example of the API you'd like to see.
import atemporal from 'atemporal';
atemporal('2024-01-15').yourIdea();
```

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I would need help from a maintainer to implement it
- [ ] This is just an idea; I would not be able to implement it
